The '''''Startled Circuit''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by the [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]-employed spacer duo [[Garron]] and [[Vareth]].

==History==
After losing both his parents to a shuttle crash, the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Garron]] used the insurance money to buy the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''Startled Circuit''. Along with his partner [[Vareth]], Garron and the ''Startled Circuit'' made their way to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], where Jabba's [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] was impressed enough with Garron and Vareth's skills that he offered them employment as [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] in the Hutt's criminal organization. In addition to Jabba's employ, the ''Startled Circuit'' was also available for hire by others in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].<ref name="GG7" />
